xss.description: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

dos.description: CWE-20: Improper Input Validation leading to Denial of Service

fileUpload.description: CWE-434: Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type

imageProcessor.description: CWE-94: Небезопасная обработка загруженных файлов с выполнением PHP-кода
